name: Lyra
text: The wind is so much sharper up here on the roof... You can see the whole school from this ledge, Cain.

name: Cain
text: Get away from the edge. It's not safe. Why did you bring the art project up here?

name: Lyra
text: The comedy mask? It’s funny, isn't it? We spent weeks layering the paper, painting the perfect smile...

name: Lyra
text: But it’s just a shell. Like me. I spend every day 'masking' so they don't see the version of me they talk about in the halls.

name: Lyra
text: Tell me, Cain... if I take the mask off, is there even a person left underneath? Or am I just... empty?
